meta.name: AHMED SHOW VS MOSAAD
meta.description:
Mosaad Al-Dosari (Team Falcons boss) said on Al-Liwaan podcast that Ahmed Show can't join Falcons due to past mistakes against the team/creators (details withheld to protect him), despite a resolved personal apology and 10+ years of friendship—door is closed forever.

Ahmed responded, calling it unprofessional to air private issues publicly after reconciliation, and dared Mosaad to spill everything.
